title: I welcome the unexpected
subtitle: A release-and-allow statement for receiving windfalls without suspicion.
excerpt: A short energy statement from Day 33 of the MONEY program. The release names the checking-for-the-catch reflex; the allow opens room to receive unexpected money cleanly.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 33 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release/allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you notice the reflex of immediately discounting or bracing around unexpected good news financially.

content.text: A short energy statement from Day 33 of the MONEY program. The release addresses the checking-for-the-catch reflex; the allow opens room to receive surprise money without the immediate search for what's wrong with it.
I am ready to release the belief that unexpected money must come with a catch. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow unexpected money to arrive cleanly. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Drawn from Day 33 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release/allow structure is the core method of The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
